executive_summary: Including example values in docker compose

change_units.title: Fix Langfuse crash during auth
change_units.description: Without this any agentic calls fail if LangFuse is offline or temporarily unavailable due to uncaught auth exception
change_units.inferred_intent: Prevent crashes by handling LangFuse availability
change_units.rationale: Direct evidence from commit message and context

change_units.title: Update LangFuse configuration in docker compose
change_units.description: Added 'release' parameter and updated LangFuse host configuration
change_units.rationale: Reflects update to include LangFuse release and security settings

risks_and_concerns: Potential security risk with omitted LangFuse credentials in commit
Dependency on LangFuse being available for agent to function
